name: create_data_request
description: Create a data request that generates a shareable web form link. When someone fills out the form, the submitted data is automatically merged into the specified PDF template and a PDF is generated. This is useful when you need to collect information from another person (e.g., a client signing a contract) without them needing API access. You can specify which fields to show, set pre-filled values, and configure notification emails.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the template to associate with this data request.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A name for this data request, for your own reference.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address to notify when the data request form is completed.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Array of field names to include in the form. If omitted, all template fields are shown.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Pre-filled data for fields that should not be editable by the form respondent.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata to attach to the data request.

parameters.name: auth_type
parameters.description: Authentication type for the form: 'none' (public link), 'password', or 'email_address'. Default is 'none'.
